nodes.context: Filipino street gang founded in the 1940s in Manila, involved in drug and weapons trafficking, murder, and other crimes. Active in Philippines and US.
Rival gang that tried to take control after Emong's death; opposed by Bahala Na Gang.

edges.evidence_quote: To counter the existing Sige-Sige Gang, Divino formed the Bahala Na Gang
edges.context: Bahala Na Gang was formed to counter the Sige-Sige Gang, indicating conflict.

edges.evidence_quote: In June 2020, gang members Robert Yabut and Raymart Yabut were captured in a buy-bust operation together with members of the Sputnik gang.
edges.context: Members of Bahala Na Gang and Sputnik gang were captured together, suggesting cooperation.
